_comment: Binding-contract + visual-expectation companion for bldc_motor_demo.vcd, the Pro BLDC Motor Stage widget's demonstration fixture. Unlike the sibling bldc_spinup_demo/bldc_six_step_slow fixtures (which predate the widget and carry a richer HDL-telemetry contract: rpm/mech_angle/phase_u.v.w/hall_u.v.w/comm_state/...), this fixture's signals are named 1:1 with the artboard's `Motor` state-machine inputs so they bind directly with no normalizer gymnastics. Regenerate with `dart run tool/generate_bldc_stage_fixture.dart` (writes both fixture trees).

bindings.speed: Number 0..1 -> rotor angular velocity. Bind with speedFullScale=1 (this fixture is pre-normalized).
bindings.phaseA: Number -1..+1 -> coil A drive (0 off, - cool, + warm; |v| = intensity). phaseFullScale=1.
bindings.commutate: Boolean -> accent flash on the just-switched coil; the state machine fires it on the signal rising edge.
bindings.fault: Boolean -> over-current: rotor halts + red over-current ring while asserted.

extraSignals._comment: Authentic 6-step gate-drive lines and hall sensors are also present under gate_drive/ and hall/ sub-scopes so the trace reads like a real motor capture. They are NOT bound by the widget; they exist for context and for users who want to overlay them on the waveform.

checkpoints.note: Idle pose: rotor parked, all coils dark, no fault.
Full-speed cruise: two coils energized (B cool / C warm), coil A floating; rotor spinning fast.
Fault window: over-current asserted, rotor halted, coils dark, red ring shown.
Recovered: fault cleared, spin resumes at full speed.
